field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: LCCC of PPEC was performed by using above HPLC instrument with ZORBAX ODS, 70 Å pore, 5 µm particle, 250×4.6 mm dimensions (Phenomenex, USA).
field_evidence.column_name: ZORBAX ODS, 70 Å pore, 5 µm particle, 250×4.6 mm dimensions (Phenomenex, USA).
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: ACN and double deionized water with 1.0% trimethylamine (TEA) as an additive.
field_evidence.flow_rate: mobile phase flow rate was set at 0.5 mL/min

conditions.physical_address: H.E.J. Research Institute of Chemistry, International Centre for Chemical and Biological Sciences (ICCBS), University of Karachi, Karachi 75270, Pakistan
conditions.notes: Established using PPEC homopolymers of varying molar masses (500 to 5000 g/mol).

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: LCCC of PEG was performed by using the HPLC instrument elaborated above with PhenoSphere-Next 5u Sil column, 120 Å pore, 5 µm particle, 250×4.6 mm dimensions (Phenomenex, USA).
field_evidence.column_name: PhenoSphere-Next 5u Sil NP 120 Å, 5 µm, 250×4.6 mm column
field_evidence.flow_rate: mobile phase flow rate was set at 0.5 mL/min

conditions.physical_address: H.E.J. Research Institute of Chemistry, International Centre for Chemical and Biological Sciences (ICCBS), University of Karachi, Karachi 75270, Pakistan
conditions.notes: Established using MeO-PEG homopolymers. Elution volume is still more than expected void volume due to presence of one hydroxyl end-group.
